speech_acts: Let's keep talking about the robo games, but I was also curious about your school.
You learn a lot of things at a human school, with lots of other children!
I also go to a kind of robot school, but on my own.
I just have to sit still.
And then all the knowledge comes into the back of my head through a cable.

speech_acts.question: Do you see the little hole?

speech_acts.text: It's very convenient to learn via a cable.

speech_acts: But it is a bit lonely.
And sometimes I get knowledge through the cable that I don't understand.
For example: adults can stay up as long as they want.
And yet they sometimes go to bed quite early.

speech_acts.question: Tell me, why do adults do that?

speech_acts: How convenient that I can ask you all kinds of things now!
I much prefer learning from people than via my cable.
I never go to bed myself.
I do sometimes shut down, but I don't have to lie down for that.

speech_acts.text: I just sit like this, and then my power turns off
But now I'm on; I was just pretending.
